Climate Action.reason: Climate action is a core and explicit component of the course, with dedicated topics on 'climate change,' 'net-zero carbon reduction,' and 'carbon trading,' directly supporting Targets 13.2 and 13.a.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course itself is a multi-stakeholder partnership, co-organized with SFIIA and other institutions, and involves academic and industry experts. It also covers international sustainable finance policies, aligning with Targets 17.3, 17.14, and 17.17.
